final_text:
{
  "test_strategy": "A comprehensive testing strategy will be implemented to ensure the Cricket Worldcup Management System meets all functional and non-functional requirements. This will include functional testing, API testing, security testing, integration testing, and regression testing. Test cases will be designed based on the detailed API documentation and codebase provided. The testing environment will be set up according to the instructions provided for QA handoff.",
  "functional_test_scenarios": [
    "Verify user authentication and authorization functionality.",
    "Test team and player management features.",
    "Validate match scheduling and results tracking functionality.",
    "Ensure fan engagement features (e.g., live scores, news) work as expected."
  ],
  "api_test_scenarios": [
    "Test the User API endpoints for user registration, login, and profile management.",
    "Validate the Team API endpoints for team creation, management, and player assignment.",
    "Check the Match API endpoints for match scheduling, results submission, and retrieval."
  ],
  "security_test_scenarios": [
    "Test JWT authentication for secure user sessions.",
    "Verify encryption for sensitive data storage.",
    "Check access control and permissions for different user roles."
  ],
  "integration_test_scenarios": [
    "Test the integration between User Management Service, Team Management Service, Match Scheduling Service, and Results Tracking Service.",
    "Validate the integration with the payment gateway.",
    "Check the integration with third-party analytics."
  ],
  "regression_test_scenarios": [
    "Regression test all functional and API test scenarios after any code changes or updates."
  ],
  "qa_notes": [
    "Ensure to follow the detailed API documentation and codebase provided for testing.",
    "Use the provided test cases and environment setup instructions for QA handoff."
  ]
}
